title: RenodeServer: handle RX_ENTER and RX_EXIT messages
description:
Add handlers for RX_ENTER and RX_EXIT in renode_server.py:

```python
async def _handle_connection(self, reader, writer):
    ...
    if msg_type == MSG_RX_ENTER:
        await self._handle_rx_enter(data)
    elif msg_type == MSG_RX_EXIT:
        await self._handle_rx_exit()
    ...

async def _handle_rx_enter(self, data: bytes) -> None:
    """Handle RX_ENTER - firmware entered RX mode."""
    timeout_us = decode_rx_enter(get_message_payload(data))
    logger.debug("Renode RX_ENTER: timeout %d us", timeout_us)
    
    self._simulation.enter_rx_mode(
        self._node_id,
        timeout_us,
        on_packet=self._on_rx_packet,
        on_timeout=self._on_rx_timeout,
    )

async def _handle_rx_exit(self) -> None:
    """Handle RX_EXIT - firmware left RX mode."""
    logger.debug("Renode RX_EXIT")
    self._simulation.exit_rx_mode(self._node_id)
```

Remove or deprecate _handle_rx_poll() (full removal in separate bead).
acceptance_criteria: RX_ENTER puts node in RX_WAIT; RX_EXIT cancels; integration test shows time advances in BARRIER_SYNC
close_reason: Wired RX_ENTER/RX_EXIT message handlers in RenodeServer to simulation enter_rx_mode/exit_rx_mode
